title: Tetrion White Spirit, 2 L (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
LARGE 2L BOTTLE: This sizeable bottle of Tetrion White Spirit is ideal for effectively cleaning oil-based and automotive spray paints, ensuring consistent results
VERSATILE SOLVENT: Suitable for multiple uses including paint thinning, brush cleaning, and even acting as a fine crack filler for seamless repairs, adding flexibility to your projects
POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: This effective solvent excels at removing unwanted paint from surfaces, delivering high-quality results and maintaining the integrity of your projects
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Designed for both interior and exterior applications, Tetrion White Spirit is great for cleaning exterior paints and applying concrete fillers efficiently
CONVENIENT HANDLING: The 2L bottle is conveniently sized for easy storage and use in various painting projects, providing both portability and practicality
